stories.title: YCXXKJ Baby Bath Seat Recall — Stop Use and Discard, Manufacturer Not Responding

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
RECALL: YCXXKJ baby bath seats (Model YD-1958) tip over with infants inside — drowning risk. ~9,000 sold on Amazon by BenTalk. Stop use now. Write "recalled" on it and discard.

Manufacturer stopped responding. cpsc.gov #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Bought a baby bath seat on Amazon in the last 2 years? Check the back for "Model: YD-1958." If it's there, stop using it immediately — CPSC issued a Do Not Use warning.

Toss it. The maker won't refund. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: CPSC Recalls YCXXKJ Baby Bath Seats — Drowning Hazard, Discard Immediately

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
YCXXKJ Baby Bath Seat Recall

#### Image 1A — Primary (Alert/Warning)
**Filename:** story-1-bath-seat-recall-primary.png
**Dimensions:** 1200x675 (X post)
**Prompt:**
A close-up photograph-style illustration of a yellow plastic baby bath seat sitting on the edge of a white bathtub, slightly tilted at an unstable angle. The seat has a molded contoured shape with suction cup bases. Water droplets on the white tub surface. Soft bathroom lighting, slightly cool tone. The mood is cautionary — something is visually off-balance. Clean white tile background. Ample empty space in the bottom third of the image for text overlay. No people, no text, no logos. Photorealistic style with soft edges.

**Color palette:** White, pale yellow, soft blue-grey
**Art style:** Clean photorealistic illustration, minimal

---

#### Image 1B — Secondary (Action/Discard)
**Filename:** story-1-bath-seat-recall-secondary.png
**Dimensions:** 1200x630 (Facebook)
**Prompt:**
A flat-lay style illustration showing a plastic baby bath seat on a kitchen counter next to a permanent marker with the cap off — implying the "write recalled on it" action step. The surface is clean white countertop. Soft warm natural light from above. The bath seat is yellow with a simple molded shape. No text written on the seat in the image. Mood is informative and action-oriented. Clear open space across the bottom third for text overlay. No people, no brand logos, no text in the image. Clean, organized visual style.

**Color palette:** White, pale yellow, dark marker black, warm light
**Art style:** Flat-lay product illustration, photorealistic

---

research.facts:
YCXXKJ Baby Bath Seat Recall
**Sources consulted:**
- cpsc.gov/Recalls/2026/YCXXKJ-Baby-Bath-Seats-Recalled
- cpsc.gov/Warnings/2026/CPSC-Warns-Consumers-to-Stop-Using-YCXXKJ-Baby-Bath-Seats
- thehill.com/homenews/nexstar_media_wire/5646850-two-baby-products-sold-on-amazon-recalled
- x.com/USCPSC (CPSC official tweet)
**Verified Facts:**
- Product: YCXXKJ baby bath seats, Model YD-1958 [HIGH — CPSC.gov official]
- Hazard: Unstable, can tip over; drowning risk [HIGH — CPSC.gov official]
- Units recalled: approximately 9,000 [HIGH — CPSC.gov and search summary]
- Sold by: BenTalk on Amazon [HIGH — CPSC.gov official]
- Sale period: May 2024 through October 2025 [HIGH — CPSC.gov official]
- Price: approximately $36 [HIGH — CPSC.gov official]
- Colors: blue, gray, pink, yellow; two detachable arms; four suction cups; three toys (duck, turtle, whale) [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
- "Model: YD-1958" printed on tracking label on back of bath seat [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
- CPSC issued separate "Do Not Use" warning because BenTalk has stopped responding to refund requests [HIGH — cpsc.gov/Warnings page]
- Consumer action: Stop use immediately, write "recalled" on the seat, discard [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
- Contact: cpsc.gov or 1-800-638-2772 [HIGH — CPSC.gov standard hotline]
- Contact (company): 213-579-2588 or bentalkhere@outlook.com — NOTE: company not responding [MEDIUM]
- Violates mandatory standard for infant bath seats [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
**Priority 1 claims (HIGH):** Units (~9,000), Model YD-1958, Amazon/BenTalk, sale dates May 2024-Oct 2025, $36, colors/description, discard instruction, CPSC hotline

stories.title: Joolz Aer2 Car Seat Adapter Recall — Fall Hazard, Register Online for Full Refund

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
RECALL: Joolz Aer2 Car Seat Adapters can detach from strollers — infant fall risk. ~3,840 sold at Nordstrom/Bloomingdale's/Amazon, June 2025-May 2026.

Stop use. Register for full refund: [URL] #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Have a Joolz Aer2 stroller? The car seat adapter was just recalled — it can fail to attach, dropping the car seat. June 18 CPSC recall, 0 injuries so far.

Refund available. cpsc.gov #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Joolz Aer2 Car Seat Adapters Recalled — Stop Use, Full Refund Available

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Joolz Aer2 Car Seat Adapter Recall

#### Image 2A — Primary (Alert/Warning)
**Filename:** story-2-joolz-adapter-recall-primary.png
**Dimensions:** 1200x675 (X post)
**Prompt:**
A close-up illustration of a modern lightweight stroller frame connection point where a car seat adapter would clip in. The connector is shown slightly unlatched or unsecured — a small visible gap between the adapter bracket and the stroller tube, suggesting improper attachment. The stroller frame is a clean matte black aluminum. The background is a soft blurred outdoor park scene in natural light. Mood is cautionary. No infant, no car seat visible. Clean open bottom third for text overlay. No text or logos in the image. Photorealistic illustration style.

**Color palette:** Black, silver, blurred green/beige outdoor tones
**Art style:** Photorealistic product close-up

---

#### Image 2B — Secondary (Refund/Resolution)
**Filename:** story-2-joolz-adapter-recall-secondary.png
**Dimensions:** 1200x630 (Facebook)
**Prompt:**
A clean flat-lay style illustration of a detached stroller car seat adapter placed on a neutral beige surface next to a smartphone showing a generic registration confirmation screen (no actual brand visible). A prepaid shipping label envelope is nearby. Natural soft daylight from a window on the left. The mood is organized and resolution-focused. No people visible, no logos, no text in the image. Ample clean space across the bottom third for text overlay. Photorealistic illustration, minimal and calm.

**Color palette:** Warm beige, matte black metal, soft white
**Art style:** Flat-lay photorealistic illustration

---

research.facts:
Joolz Aer2 Car Seat Adapter Recall
**Sources consulted:**
- cpsc.gov/Recalls/2026/Joolz-Recalls-Aer2-Car-Seat-Adapters-for-Strollers
- growingyourbaby.com/joolz-aer2-car-seat-adapter-recall/
- canada.ca/en/alert-recall/joolz-aer2-car-seat-adapter-set-recalled-due-fall-hazard
**Verified Facts:**
- Product: Joolz Aer2 Car Seat Adapters for Strollers [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
- Hazard: Can fail to attach properly; car seat can fall [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
- Recall date: June 18, 2026 [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
- Units recalled: approximately 3,840 in US (plus ~148 in Canada) [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
- Sold at: Bloomingdale's, Nordstrom, specialty stores, joolz.com, bloomingdales.com, nordstrom.com, amazon.com [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
- Sale period: June 2025 to May 2026 [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
- Price: approximately $50 [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
- Incidents: 1 report of adapter detaching; 0 injuries [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
- Consumer action: Stop use, detach from stroller, register at joolzcarseatadapter.expertinquiry.com [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
- Refund method: Electronic payment or virtual prepaid gift card via prepaid shipping label return [HIGH — CPSC.gov]
**Priority 1 claims (HIGH):** Units (3,840), sale dates, $50, retailers listed, 1 incident/0 injuries, refund URL

stories.title: Bear Creek Pollinator Celebration — 5 Days Away (Friday June 26)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Bear Creek Pollinator Celebration is Friday — 5 days away. June 26, 12:30–2 PM at Bear Creek Regional Park.

$5/person. Bug sweeps, native pollinator education, hands-on learning. Great for all ages. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Bear Creek Pollinator Celebration Is This Friday — $5, All Ages, West COS

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Bear Creek Pollinator Celebration

#### Image 3A — Primary (Event)
**Filename:** story-3-bear-creek-pollinator-primary.png
**Dimensions:** 1200x675 (X post)
**Prompt:**
A bright outdoor scene at a Colorado nature park in late June. In the foreground, a colorful native wildflower meadow with bees and a large butterfly visible on flowers — purple coneflowers, golden black-eyed Susans, and lavender. In the background, pine trees and soft Colorado mountain ridgeline under a clear blue sky with a few white clouds. The mood is joyful and summery. Sunshine, warm natural light. Clean open space across the bottom third of the image. No people, no text, no logos. Photorealistic illustration style, vibrant but natural.

**Color palette:** Purple, gold, green, bright sky blue, pine green
**Art style:** Photorealistic nature illustration, vibrant

---

#### Image 3B — Secondary (Kids Activity)
**Filename:** story-3-bear-creek-pollinator-secondary.png
**Dimensions:** 1200x630 (Facebook)
**Prompt:**
A close-up nature illustration of a child's small hand holding a large magnifying glass up to a leaf with a resting monarch butterfly on it. The background is a soft-blurred Colorado meadow with wildflowers. Warm dappled afternoon sunlight. The hand is small, non-specific — no face visible. Mood is curious, wonder-filled, hands-on learning. Clean open bottom third for text overlay. No text, no logos. Photorealistic illustration style with warm, inviting colors.

**Color palette:** Warm orange and black (butterfly), soft green, golden sunlight
**Art style:** Warm photorealistic illustration, close-up nature

---

stories.title: Cheyenne Mountain Zoo's 100th Birthday — Giraffe Center Opening This Summer

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Cheyenne Mountain Zoo turns 100 this year — and it's opening a $40M giraffe center this summer.

11 feeding zones (was 3). New record-breaking ETFE roof. Weeklong grand opening celebration. cmzoo.org #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Cheyenne Mountain Zoo Turns 100 — New $40M Giraffe Center Opening This Summer

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Cheyenne Mountain Zoo Centennial

#### Image 4A — Primary (Centennial/Giraffe Center)
**Filename:** story-4-cmz-centennial-primary.png
**Dimensions:** 1200x675 (X post)
**Prompt:**
A wide-angle illustration of two adult giraffes standing tall in a spacious modern zoo habitat with a clear ETFE dome roof overhead, allowing natural Colorado mountain light to filter through. The habitat has wooden feeding platforms at different heights, lush landscaping, and warm earthy tones. Rocky Mountain scenery is faintly visible through large glass panels in the background. The mood is celebratory, expansive, majestic. Warm golden afternoon light. Clean open space in the bottom third. No people, no text, no logos. Photorealistic illustration, grand and beautiful.

**Color palette:** Golden tan, earthy brown, sky blue, mountain grey-green
**Art style:** Photorealistic architectural + wildlife illustration

---

#### Image 4B — Secondary (Family Experience)
**Filename:** story-4-cmz-centennial-secondary.png
**Dimensions:** 1200x630 (Facebook)
**Prompt:**
An illustration of a giraffe at a raised wooden feeding platform extending its neck toward the viewer, as if taking food from a hand just outside the frame. The platform is elevated, with a Colorado mountain vista blurred in the background through large glass panels. Warm afternoon light. The giraffe's face fills the upper-center frame, looking friendly and curious. Mood is joyful, awe-inspiring, family memory moment. Clean open space in the bottom third for text overlay. No people visible, no text, no logos. Photorealistic illustration, warm and inviting.

**Color palette:** Giraffe tan and brown, golden wood planks, soft blue mountain haze
**Art style:** Photorealistic warm illustration, close-up wildlife

---

research.facts:
Cheyenne Mountain Zoo Centennial
**Sources consulted:**
- cmzoo.org/news/archive/cmzoos-monumental-year-centennial-celebrations-ceo-transition-and-giraffe-center-opening-in-2026/
- gazette.com/2025/10/22/what-to-know-about-cheyenne-mountain-zoos-new-giraffe-center-coming-in-2026/
- fox21news.com/news/local/2026-marks-100-years-of-the-cheyenne-mountain-zoo/
- kktv.com/2025/08/25/big-expansion-biggest-resident-giraffe-project-well-underway-cheyenne-mountain-zoo/
**Verified Facts:**
- Zoo founded: 1926 by Spencer Penrose [HIGH — cmzoo.org official]
- 2026 is zoo's centennial (100th anniversary) year [HIGH — fox21news.com, cmzoo.org]
- Opening: International Center for the Care and Conservation of Giraffe — summer 2026 [HIGH — cmzoo.org]
- Cost: $40 million [HIGH — cmzoo.org, a-z-animals.com, fox21news.com]
- New indoor barn: 12,000 sq ft [HIGH — cmzoo.org]
- ETFE clear roof: largest of its kind covering an animal exhibit in North America [HIGH — cmzoo.org]
- Feeding zones: 11 (up from 3) [HIGH — cmzoo.org article]
- Outdoor space increase: 25% [HIGH — cmzoo.org]
- Bronze sculptures: 6 full-size bronze giraffes by sculptor Antonia Chastain [HIGH — cmzoo.org]
- The sculptures represent the 200+ giraffe calves born at the zoo since the 1950s [HIGH — cmzoo.org]
- Weeklong grand opening celebration planned [HIGH — cmzoo.org]
- Only mountain zoo in US [HIGH — well-established fact, confirmed in searches]
- Website: cmzoo.org [HIGH]
**Priority 1 claims (HIGH):** Founded 1926, $40M, 12,000 sq ft barn, 11 feeding zones, ETFE claim (largest of its kind), 25% outdoor expansion

stories.title: Colorado Springs Sunday Market — Summer Guide for Families

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Colorado Springs Sunday Market runs every Sunday through Oct 25 at Acacia Park — 9 AM to 2 PM. Free. 60+ vendors. Local produce, artisan goods, live music.

18 Sundays left this season. See you there. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Colorado Springs Sunday Market — Family Guide for the 2026 Season

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Colorado Springs Sunday Market

#### Image 5A — Primary (Market Scene)
**Filename:** story-5-sunday-market-primary.png
**Dimensions:** 1200x675 (X post)
**Prompt:**
A wide-angle illustration of a vibrant outdoor farmers market at a park in downtown Colorado Springs on a sunny Sunday morning. Colorful vendor tents with fresh produce, flowers, and artisan goods fill the scene. A few reusable shopping bags hang from a stall. String lights overhead. Green park trees frame the scene. Blue Colorado sky with light clouds above. The mood is lively, community-centered, warm summer morning. No faces visible, no logos or text on signage. Clean empty space across the bottom third of the frame. Photorealistic illustration style, warm and inviting.

**Color palette:** Warm red/orange tent canopies, green produce, bright blue sky, natural wood
**Art style:** Photorealistic illustration, lively outdoor market

---

#### Image 5B — Secondary (Fresh Produce / Family Shopping)
**Filename:** story-5-sunday-market-secondary.png
**Dimensions:** 1200x630 (Facebook)
**Prompt:**
A flat-lay close-up illustration of a wooden farmers market crate filled with fresh Colorado produce — colorful bell peppers, heirloom tomatoes, small bundles of carrots with greens, fresh herbs. A small handwritten chalkboard price tag is nearby (no readable text). A cloth tote bag is visible at the edge of the frame. Warm morning sunlight on a wooden market table. Mood is fresh, wholesome, local. Clean open bottom third for text overlay. No people, no brand logos, no legible text in the image. Photorealistic illustration, bright and appetizing.

**Color palette:** Red, orange, yellow, green produce, warm wood brown, natural light
**Art style:** Flat-lay photorealistic illustration, fresh and bright
